video:video.video:title: Soldrift GitHub Main Profile Links to Telegram @devbeast5775 — OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: Actual YouTube record for the main Soldrift GitHub profile path and its visible link to Telegram @devbeast5775. This video is used as a primary identity-mapping exhibit for the Soldrift / devbeast5775 / hodlwarden OSINT warning archive.

video:video.video:title: Soldrift / Hodlwarden Pump.fun Bundler Overlap — GitHub OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: Actual YouTube record focused on Soldrift / Hodlwarden Pump.fun bundler overlap and related GitHub repository context. This exhibit supports the Solana bot, bundler, private-key exposure, wallet-access, and malicious-backdoor risk frame.

video:video.video:title: Two GitHub Identities Same Telegram Contact Path — OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: Actual YouTube record comparing two GitHub identity paths that lead toward the same Telegram contact route. This exhibit supports the alias-cluster concern linking Soldrift, devbeast5775, hodlwarden, and related developer-account infrastructure.

video:video.video:title: Hodlwarden GitHub Contact Path to Telegram @devbeast5775 — OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: Actual YouTube record documenting the Hodlwarden GitHub contact path and its connection to Telegram @devbeast5775. This exhibit explains why hodlwarden is indexed with Soldrift / devbeast5775 in the same public OSINT identity-cluster warning.

video:video.video:title: Soldrift / Hodlwarden / devbeast5775 Scam Warning — GitHub, Telegram, Solana Bot OSINT Evidence
video:video.video:description: Actual YouTube record for the broader Soldrift / Hodlwarden / devbeast5775 scam-warning archive, combining GitHub, Telegram, and Solana bot-risk evidence into a public Web3 OSINT safety notice.

video:video.video:title: This Was Not a Simple Scam — Soldrift / Hodlwarden Credibility Infrastructure Fraud
video:video.video:description: Actual YouTube overview framing the case as a credibility-infrastructure fraud concern, covering developer branding, public-profile trust signals, GitHub and Telegram identity paths, and the broader suspected organized crypto cybercrime-network warning.
